message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>We introduce a model to interpret discordant SARS-CoV-2 test results and estimate that an individual receiving a positive rapid antigen test followed by a negative Nucleic Acid Amplification Test had only a 12-24% chance of being infected in the United States from March 2020 to May 2022.</jats:p>
title: Interpreting discordant SARS-CoV-2 diagnostic test results
